name_en: Classic and timeless, this Chanel white quilted bag is a fashion favorite. Black and white contrast outlines a refined silhouette, the iconic double-C logo exudes luxury, and paired with a sparkling chain, it's eye-catching whether worn on the shoulder or crossbody. Carry it to effortlessly navigate the city; every step is a focal point. Model 4515. Dimensions 11.5*18.5*11.
